mapper.insert: insert into app_notification ( user_id, sender_user_id, notification_type, title, content, related_type, related_id, read_flag, create_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{senderUserId}, #{notificationType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{relatedType}, #{relatedId}, #{readFlag}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: select n.related_id as announcement_id, max(n.title) as title, max(n.content) as content, count(*) as recipient_count, max(n.create_time) as create_time from app_notification n where n.notification_type = #{notificationType} and n.related_type = #{relatedType} and n.related_id is not null group by n.related_id order by create_time desc, announcement_id desc limit #{limit}
